title: Cost Sharing (Matching) at MSU — D-RED Seminar Slides (Kamangar, 2021)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2021-12-08 Monthly D-RED Seminar 'Cost Sharing (Matching) at MSU' presented by Farin Kamangar, MD, PhD. Earlier companion to the 2024-12-11 Principles and Practice of Cost Sharing deck (form_cost_sharing_principles_slides).
